messages.content: You distill validated desktop automation evidence into a compact JSON skill. Return JSON only.

Distill a narrow reusable playback skill for a macOS QQ Music black-box result activation flow. Proven facts only:
- target app id: com.tencent.QQMusicMac
- reveal shortcut: cmd+f
- reveal settle ms: 300
- submit settle ms: 900
- validated query: aa
- validated visible row anchor: Cure For Me
- validated playback title after activation: Cure For Me - AURORA
- successful repeatable chain: press shortcut -> paste query with clipboard restore -> submit return -> dismiss overlay escape -> OCR resolve visible row anchor -> double-click OCR row anchor -> capture screenshot evidence -> OCR verify playback title from the captured evidence image
- verified command ids: debug.pressKey, debug.pasteTextPreserveClipboard, debug.findScreenText, debug.clickScreenText, debug.captureScreen, debug.findImageText
- do not claim generalized playback for arbitrary rows
- do not claim pointer-free playback activation
- do not claim Chinese OCR anchor stability
Return compact JSON with keys: skill_id, version, target_app, objective, required_commands, inputs, disturbance_policy, steps, verification, known_limits.
